product_overview: FURQAN Academy is an online Quran teaching platform for students, teachers, and admins with role-based access, booking, video sessions, reports, and operational automation. The backend supports authentication, bookings, payments, webhooks, cron maintenance, admin controls, and reporting across the learning lifecycle.
core_goals: Provide secure role-based authentication for students, teachers, and admins
Enable students and teachers to create and manage session bookings
Support payment checkout and webhook-based package fulfillment
Process external video and automation webhooks reliably
Expose admin controls for platform health, workflow management, and operational oversight
Generate and send per-session teacher reports
Run scheduled maintenance and scoring jobs for retention, reconciliation, and session completion

features.name: Authentication
features.description: Supabase-based authentication with Google OAuth callback, cross-device session handoff, and logout for student, teacher, and admin roles.
user_flows: GET /api/auth/callback/google after successful Google OAuth -> Receive 302 redirect to dashboard with Supabase session established
GET /api/auth/handoff/[code] with a valid one-time handoff code -> Receive 302 redirect with transferred session on the target device
POST /api/auth/logout with an authenticated session -> Receive 302 redirect to home and session cookies cleared
GET /api/auth/handoff/[code] with an expired or invalid code -> Receive 404 Invalid or expired code
POST /api/auth/logout without authentication -> Receive 401 Unauthorized or session-clearing failure response

features.name: Bookings API
features.description: Authenticated booking endpoints for students and teachers to list existing bookings and create new session bookings.
user_flows: GET /api/bookings with a valid user session -> Receive 200 with Booking[] for the authenticated user
POST /api/bookings with valid booking data and an authenticated session -> Receive 200 with the created Booking record
GET /api/bookings without a valid session -> Receive 401 Unauthorized
POST /api/bookings without a valid session -> Receive 401 Unauthorized

features.name: Stripe Payments
features.description: Checkout session creation for package purchases and webhook processing for payment completion events.
user_flows: POST /api/stripe/checkout with an authenticated session and valid packageId -> Receive 200 with a Stripe checkout session URL
POST /api/stripe/webhook with a verified Stripe event payload -> Receive 200 Acknowledged and payment fulfillment proceeds
POST /api/stripe/checkout with an invalid packageId -> Receive 400 Invalid package
POST /api/stripe/checkout without authentication -> Receive 401 Unauthorized
POST /api/stripe/webhook with an invalid signature -> Receive 400 Invalid signature

features.name: Video Webhooks
features.description: Webhook receivers for Daily.co, Bunny.net, and n8n automation events used to keep session lifecycle and video processing state in sync.
user_flows: POST /api/webhooks/daily with a valid HMAC-signed Daily event payload -> Receive 200 Processed and session lifecycle updates are applied
POST /api/webhooks/bunny with a valid Bunny encoding status payload -> Receive 200 Processed
POST /api/webhooks/n8n with a valid automation secret -> Receive 200 Processed
POST /api/webhooks/daily with an invalid signature -> Receive 401 Invalid signature
POST /api/webhooks/bunny with an invalid signature -> Receive 401 Invalid signature
POST /api/webhooks/n8n with an invalid secret -> Receive 401 Invalid secret

features.name: Cron Jobs
features.description: Scheduled maintenance endpoints triggered by n8n using dual-secret authentication for cleanup, completion, scoring, and reconciliation tasks.
user_flows: POST /api/cron/audit-cleanup with valid CRON_SECRET and X-N8N-Secret headers -> Receive 200 with cleanup stats
POST /api/cron/auto-complete-sessions with valid cron credentials -> Receive 200 with completion stats
POST /api/cron/murajaah-compute with valid cron credentials -> Receive 200 with compute stats for memorization schedules
POST /api/cron/reconciliation with valid cron credentials -> Receive 200 with reconciliation stats
POST /api/cron/audit-cleanup without the required secrets -> Receive 401 Missing or invalid cron secret
POST /api/cron/reconciliation with invalid cron credentials -> Receive 401 Missing or invalid cron secret

features.name: n8n Management API
features.description: Admin-only proxy endpoints for monitoring and controlling n8n workflows and executions.
user_flows: GET /api/n8n/workflows with an authenticated admin session -> Receive 200 with Workflow[]
POST /api/n8n/toggle with admin credentials and a valid workflowId plus active flag -> Receive 200 with updated workflow state
GET /api/n8n/workflows with a non-admin authenticated session -> Receive 403 Not admin
POST /api/n8n/toggle without admin privileges -> Receive 403 Not admin

features.name: Session Reports
features.description: Authenticated endpoints for retrieving per-session teacher reports and sending report notifications to students.
user_flows: GET /api/reports/session/[id] with a valid authenticated user session -> Receive 200 with SessionReport
POST /api/reports/session/[id]/send with an authorized teacher or admin session -> Receive 200 Sent and the report notification is dispatched
GET /api/reports/session/[id] for a missing session report -> Receive 404 Not found
POST /api/reports/session/[id]/send by an unauthorized user -> Receive 403 Not authorized

features.name: Retention Scoring
features.description: Authenticated scoring endpoint for computing student retention risk scores used by operational and retention workflows.
user_flows: POST /api/retention/score with an authenticated session -> Receive 200 with scoring stats for students
POST /api/retention/score without authentication -> Receive 401 Unauthorized

features.name: Admin Control Tower
features.description: Admin dashboard snapshot endpoint that aggregates platform health, including sessions, payments, and alerts.
user_flows: GET /api/admin/control-tower/snapshot with an authenticated admin session -> Receive 200 with platform Snapshot
GET /api/admin/control-tower/snapshot with a non-admin authenticated session -> Receive 403 Not admin
GET /api/admin/control-tower/snapshot without authentication -> Receive 401 Unauthorized

known_limitations.issue: Most business logic lives in Next.js server actions ("use server"), not REST endpoints, so API-level tests cover only a subset of platform behavior
known_limitations.impact: Backend API test coverage will not exercise booking/lesson/quiz server-action flows directly

known_limitations.issue: Cron endpoints require dual secrets (CRON_SECRET + N8N_WEBHOOK_SECRET) not available to the test runner
known_limitations.impact: Cron endpoints will return 401 in tests unless secrets are configured

known_limitations.issue: Webhook endpoints verify provider signatures (Stripe, Daily, Bunny)
known_limitations.impact: Synthetic webhook tests without valid signatures will be rejected with 400/401
